title.zh-CN: 首帧原图 - 早期探索版 (00183)

description.zh-CN: EVOMAP HACKTHON 招募视频首帧的早期 Neo-Brutalism 海报版本
description.en-US: Early Neo-Brutalism poster version for EVOMAP HACKTHON recruitment video first frame

creation.prompt: Cyber-Taoist character poster, Neo-Brutalism meets Cyberpunk style. A tall elegant figure with 7.5-8 head proportion, slender and upright posture. Flowing organic curves silhouette with no sharp angles on the body. Spiky upright short hair, sharp and angular contrasting with the soft body curves. Half-face mask with bright yellow #FCD228 circular logo with black JS letters covering eyes and above, 3px black outline, hard shadow. Glowing yellow #FCD228 circular energy core at chest center, radiating circuit/meridian lines across entire body - black main lines with yellow glowing branches. Growth Hacker pose: body leaning slightly forward 15 degrees, one hand in pocket, other hand raised operating floating holographic interface. Color palette: dominant bright yellow #FCD228, pure black #000000, white #FFFFFF. Background: 50px technical grid pattern, 3px solid black borders, 4-6px hard shadows. High quality, detailed, poster composition, professional illustration style.
